gist.headline: Subconscious streaming
gist.blurb: DreamTag has joined the chat. Finally, an AI that can explain why you showed up to work without pants in your dream last night.
gist.summary: Integrated DreamTag, an AI-powered dream analysis application, into the Chat ecosystem.
gist.impact: Users can now receive detailed, personalized interpretations of their dreams directly through the platform.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the Bee sleeping on a cloud with a dream bubble showing surreal imagery. Represents the DreamTag app's function of analyzing dreams.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the Bee sleeping peacefully on a fluffy cloud, wearing a tiny nightcap. Above her, a large pixel thought bubble displays a surreal dreamscape with floating flowers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Ethereal lighting, dreamy vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.
